summary_en: 181,600 shares acquired cumulatively (1.75% of 10,377,523 S/O) for ¥150,988,500 in open-market purchase including ToSTNeT-3, through 29 May 2026. Authorized limit 200,000 shares (1.92% S/O) / ¥160M under January 2026 board resolution; execution window 2 February – 26 June 2026.
title_en: Notice regarding acquisition status of treasury shares
translation_en_brief: Ono Sokki filed a progress notice on 1 June 2026 for its treasury share acquisition program. In May 2026, the company acquired 68,100 shares for ¥55,011,300 via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, including off-board ToSTNeT-3 trades, from 1 to 29 May 2026. Cumulatively through 29 May, the company has acquired 181,600 shares (1.75% of outstanding shares of 10,377,523) for ¥150,988,500 against an authorized limit of 200,000 shares (1.92% of S/O) for ¥160 million. The authorization was granted by the board on 29 January 2026 with an execution window from 2 February to 26 June 2026. The acquisition is undertaken under Article 459(1) of the Companies Act and is within charter provisions.
